subcodes.first_line: The Book of God speaketh the truth in this Most Great Prison and guideth the servants unto God, the Lord of all mankind [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الله ینطق بالحق فی هذا السجن الاعظم و یهدی العباد الی الله مالک الرقاب
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @personal instructions, @proclamation to people of the Bayan
